creator: gerald@pfeifer.com
text:
Matthias,

I believe this is (mostly) a duplicate of PR 157115.  Perhaps you can
give the patch in PR 157115 a try?

> A: Can pdftk be modified so I can use openjdk? Not sure - if we want
>    native code, that might not work.

That would be lovely, yes.

> C: Can GCC46 be modified so that it either makes ends meet without ecj1,
>    or pull in the required dependencies?

That's what my suggested change to lang/gcc46 tries to accomplish, based
on the nice work Greg has done for lang/gcc45.

Gerald
